title: Tuntube Mu
subtitle: Raba ra’ayinka, bada rahoton matsala, ko nemi sabon fasali. Muna daraja gudummuwarka kuma za mu amsa da wuri-wuri.

form.securityNote: Ana kula da saƙonni cikin tsaro domin kare sirri.

business.title: Tuntubi {{businessName}}
business.subtitle: Aika saƙo mai tsaro domin neman bayanan tuntuɓa daga wannan kasuwanci.
business.highRiskNote: Buƙatarka na iya buƙatar ƙarin tantancewa saboda manufofin tsaro.

validation.nameTooLong: Suna bai kamata ya wuce haruffa 100 ba
validation.emailTooLong: Imel bai kamata ya wuce haruffa 255 ba
validation.subjectTooLong: Taken saƙo bai kamata ya wuce haruffa 120 ba
validation.reasonRequired: Da fatan a bayyana dalilin tuntuɓa
validation.reasonTooLong: Dalili bai kamata ya wuce haruffa 500 ba
validation.messageTooLong: Saƙo bai kamata ya wuce haruffa 1000 ba

toast.errorBody: An kasa aika saƙo. Da fatan a sake gwadawa.
toast.authRequiredBody: Da fatan a shiga asusu domin aika saƙo.
toast.missingContextBody: Wannan fom na buƙatar advertisementId idan yana a yanayin kasuwanci.
toast.invalidInputBody: Da fatan a cire duk wani abu da ake zargi sannan a sake gwadawa.
toast.businessSuccessBody: An aika buƙatarka cikin tsaro. Mai kasuwanci zai duba kuma zai iya tuntuɓarka ta hanyar saƙon tsaro.
toast.rateLimitBody: Ka aika saƙonni da yawa a baya-bayan nan. Da fatan a jira sannan a sake gwadawa.
toast.storageMissingTitle: Ba a saita ajiyar saƙonni ba
toast.storageMissingBody: Shafin /contact yana buƙatar teburi domin adana saƙonni (misali: contact_messages).
